text: Surah Al-Israa’ verse 23-24 which is taken as an educational concept for Muslim families in order to guide children with the principles of preventing Shirk towards Allah and worship to parents. The aim of this study is: (1) To understand the concept of Islamic education and its importance, (2) To determine educational values related to ‘Birrul walidain’ (benevolence towards parents) according to Surah Al-Israa’ verse 23-24 and (3) To evaluate the effect of the determined educational values have on the development of students’ religious character according to the glasses of Islamic education. With library research method and content analysis method, the source data was obtained from the primary and secondary materials using documentation method by reading, evaluating and analyzing the explanations of the Quran and hadith books, in order to explain the concept of the verses. After the explanation, the data will be analyzed according to the research questions. According to the results of the content analysis, the educational values related to children's attitude towards their parents within the scope of Surah Al-Israa’ verse 23-24 are kindness to parents, speaking to parents with respect and praying for parents. The educational values obtained within the scope of ‘birrul walidain’ in Surah Al-Israa’ verse 23-24 increase students' positive attitudes and behaviors towards their parents. In particular, they are more inclined to act with kindness, patience, avoid harmful behaviors towards parents, show respect and humility towards parents and to pray for their well-being in their lifetime and after death. Keywords: Islamic Education, Quran, Religious Character
